lede: A look at April 25 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Louis IX of France and Gladwyn Jebb, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: April 2015 Nepal earthquake
events.desc: At least 8,962 are killed in Nepal after a massive 7.8 magnitude earthquake strikes Nepal.

events.title: Flint water crisis
events.desc: The Flint water crisis begins when officials at Flint, Michigan switch the city's water supply to the Flint River, leading to lead and bacteria contamination.

events.title: Bulgaria
events.desc: Bulgaria and Romania sign the Treaty of Accession 2005 to join the European Union.

events.title: Violeta Chamorro
events.desc: Violeta Chamorro takes office as the President of Nicaragua, the first woman to hold the position.

events.title: Israel
events.desc: Israel completes its withdrawal from the Sinai Peninsula per the Camp David Accords.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: United States and Soviet reconnaissance troops meet in Torgau and Strehla along the River Elbe, cutting the Wehrmacht of Nazi Germany in two. This would be later known as Elbe Day.

events.title: San Remo conference
events.desc: At the San Remo conference, the principal Allied Powers of World War I adopt a resolution to determine the allocation of Class "A" League of Nations mandates for administration of the former Ottoman-ruled lands of the Middle East.

events.title: World War I
events.desc: World War I: The Battle of Gallipoli begins: The invasion of the Turkish Gallipoli Peninsula by British, French, Indian, Newfoundland, Australian and New Zealand troops begins with landings at Anzac Cove and Cape Helles.

events.title: Suez Canal
events.desc: British and French engineers break ground for the Suez Canal.

events.title: Transition from Ming to Qing
events.desc: Transition from Ming to Qing: The Chongzhen Emperor, the last Emperor of Ming China, commits suicide during a peasant rebellion led by Li Zicheng.

births.name: Gladwyn Jebb
births.line: English politician and diplomat, Secretary-General of the United Nations

births.name: Jason Lee
births.line: American skateboarder, actor, comedian and producer

deaths.text: 12th Dalai Lama, Spiritual leader of Tibet from 1860 to 1875
Hermann I, Landgrave of Thuringia, Landgrave of Thuringia and Count Palatine of Saxony
Herman I of Baden, Margrave of Baden

observances.text: Christian feast day: Peter of Saint Joseph de Betancur
